title: Kara and Nate
description: Hey, y'all! We are a husband and wife from Nashville, Tennessee.   We started our YouTube channel on a whim when we decided to take a year off and go travel back in 2016. One year quickly turned into 4, and at the very end of 2019 we stepped foot in our 100th country. If you want a quick summary of that journey you can watch the documentary here - https://bit.ly/41TbOKJ  Shortly after achieving our 100 country goal, the pandemic hit. With international travel no longer an option, we bought a van
